name: aegis-protocol
description: AI-Powered On-Chain Agent Batch Execution Network — MVP for blockchain course final project

scripts.ai:random: cd ai-generator && npx ts-node src/index.ts --mode random
scripts.ai:llm: cd ai-generator && npx ts-node src/index.ts --mode llm
scripts.ai:momentum: cd ai-generator && npx ts-node src/index.ts --mode random --strategy momentum
scripts.ai:arbitrage: cd ai-generator && npx ts-node src/index.ts --mode random --strategy arbitrage
scripts.setup:local: npm run deploy:local && npm run approve:local
scripts.start: npm run node & sleep 3 && npm run deploy:local && npm run relayer & sleep 2 && npm run ai & npm run dashboard
